title: Panel Configuration
description: Schema for panels.defaults.json and panels.local.json. Defines per-panel pass/fail thresholds, scoring models, and trigger rules. The policy that local overrides must only increase strictness (higher thresholds, not lower, than defaults) is enforced by the configuration loader/validator, not by this JSON Schema.

version.description: Semantic version of the panel configuration format.

panels.description: Per-panel configuration keyed by panel name.

enabled.description: Whether this panel is active. Cannot be set to false if the panel is required in the policy profile.

trigger.description: Trigger condition for optional panels. Overrides the policy trigger if set. Use 'always' for unconditional execution.

min_confidence.description: Minimum confidence score (0.0-1.0) for the panel to pass. Local overrides can only increase this value.

max_critical_findings.description: Maximum number of critical findings before the panel blocks. Local overrides can only decrease this value.

max_high_findings.description: Maximum number of high findings before the panel blocks. Local overrides can only decrease this value.

required_verdict.description: Aggregate verdict required for the panel to pass. 'approve' means only approve verdicts pass; 'request_changes' means both approve and request_changes pass.

min_compliance_score.description: Minimum compliance score (0.0-1.0) for the panel to pass.

floor.description: Minimum confidence score after deductions (prevents going below zero).
